landing.helmet_desc: Turn any private message into a self-destructing QR code.
landing.headline:
Send Secrets,
Not Screenshots.
landing.subheadline: Turn any private message into a self-destructing QR code. Scan to read, then it vanishes forever. Secure, fast, and simple.
landing.how_it_works_sub: Share sensitive information without leaving a digital trail.
landing.step1_desc: Write your message. We encrypt it with AES-256 before it ever hits our servers.
landing.step2_desc: We generate a unique QR code. Download it or share the short link directly.
landing.step3_desc: The recipient scans the code. After viewing, the message is permanently deleted.

pricing.helmet_desc: Simple, transparent pricing for QryptNote's secure message features.
pricing.headline: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subheadline: Choose the level of security that fits your needs.
pricing.one_time_desc: Don't want another subscription? You can also pay $1 per secure message with all Pro features unlocked.

create.helmet_desc: Encrypt a message and generate a self-destructing QR code.
create.dest_desc: The recipient has viewed the message, and it has been permanently erased from our servers.
create.ready_desc: Your private message is ready to share.
create.wait_recip: Waiting for recipient to view... Keep this tab open.
create.headline: Create Private Message
create.subheadline: Encrypt a message and generate a self-destructing QR code.
create.limit_err: You've reached the daily limit for creating private messages to prevent abuse. Please try again later or upgrade to Pro.
create.upg_pass: Upgrade to Pro to use passwords

view.helmet_desc: Decrypt and view a secure message.
view.pass_desc: This message is protected by a password.
view.destroyed_desc: This message has been viewed or expired and no longer exists.
view.burn_desc: This message will self-destruct. Do not reload the page.
view.blur_msg: Hover or tap to reveal message
view.security_notice: This message will be destroyed immediately if you switch apps, switch tabs, or leave this screen. It will remain visible as long as you stay on this page. Note: screenshots and screen recording cannot be detected by any website — this protection only applies to switching away from this screen.
view.destroyed_navigated: This message was closed because you navigated away, and can no longer be viewed

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.sec1_desc: We collect minimal data to provide our service. Encrypted messages are stored temporarily and deleted after viewing or expiration.
privacy.sec2_desc: All messages are encrypted client-side using AES-256. We do not have access to your keys.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.desc: By using QryptNote, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1_desc: You agree not to use QryptNote to transmit illegal, harmful, or abusive content. We reserve the right to ban IP addresses or users who abuse our systems, though we cannot read the contents of your messages.
terms.s2_desc: While we strive for 100% uptime, QryptNote is provided 'as is' without warranties. We are not responsible for any lost information due to server downtime or premature message destruction.
terms.s3_desc: The QryptNote logo, design, and code are the intellectual property of QryptNote. You may not copy or redistribute our assets without permission.

bug.what: What were you doing when this happened?
bug.fail: Failed to send report. Please try again.

policy.title: Privacy Policy
policy.desc: At QryptNote, your privacy is our core product. This policy explains how we handle your data.
policy.s1_desc: When you create a message, we temporarily store the encrypted ciphertext. We do not have access to the decryption keys, which are generated and kept exclusively on your device. We log basic, anonymized analytics (like view counts) but never your IP address or message content.
policy.s2_desc: The only purpose of storing the encrypted ciphertext is to deliver it to the intended recipient. Once the message is viewed (or expires), the ciphertext is permanently deleted from our servers.
policy.s3_desc: All messages are encrypted using AES-256 before leaving your device. Our infrastructure is designed so that even if our databases were compromised, the messages would remain unreadable without the specific URL hash key.

errors.msg_too_long: Message is too long. Max {{max}} characters.
errors.pass_too_short: Password must be at least 4 characters.
errors.network_timeout: Network request timed out. Please check your internet connection.
errors.msg_view_limit: Message has reached its view limit.

not_found.subtitle: Page Not Found
not_found.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.s1_p1: Message Content: We temporarily store the encrypted content of your messages. Messages are destroyed immediately if the viewer switches tabs, switches apps, or loses focus on the viewing screen, and remain visible only while the viewer stays actively on the page. We cannot view, moderate, or access the content of any message before it is viewed by the recipient, since messages are encrypted before they reach our servers. This means we cannot pre-screen content for illegal or harmful material.
privacy_page.s1_p2: Technical Data: We may collect basic technical information, such as your IP address, strictly for rate-limiting, preventing abuse, and ensuring the security of the service.
privacy_page.s1_p3: Diagnostic Data: If you submit a bug report or if an unhandled error occurs, technical diagnostic data may be automatically collected in our bug_reports and error_logs databases. This includes device/browser information, console error logs, screen size, and the page URL — but never message content itself.
privacy_page.s1_p4: Payment Information: For Pro users, payment processing is handled by a third-party payment processor (e.g., Stripe, Razorpay). We do not store your full credit card or payment information on our servers.
privacy_page.s2_p1: We use the collected information solely for the purpose of operating and securing QryptNote. This includes:
privacy_page.s2_l1: Generating and delivering your secure QR messages and links.
privacy_page.s2_l2: Enforcing disturbance-based message deletion and password protection.
privacy_page.s2_l3: Preventing spam, abuse, and bypassing of rate limits.
privacy_page.s2_l4: Processing payments for Pro tier features.
privacy_page.s3_p1: Your privacy is our primary concern. All messages are encrypted at rest. We permanently delete messages from our databases the moment the viewer loses focus on the page (e.g., switches tabs or apps). We never read, scan, or use the content of your private messages for any purpose other than delivering them to the intended recipient. Please note that no website can technically prevent screenshots or screen recording on any device — this is a limitation of all browsers.
privacy_page.s4_p1: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data or message content with third parties for marketing purposes. We may only disclose information if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities.
privacy_page.s5_p1: QryptNote uses minimal cookies and local storage necessary for the basic functioning of the application (e.g., managing user sessions for Pro accounts or saving basic preferences). We do not use third-party ad-tracking cookies.
privacy_page.s6_p1: You have the right to request the deletion of an active message before its expiry. However, because our service prioritizes anonymity and we do not tie free messages to user accounts, we cannot act on deletion requests unless you provide the unique link or ID of the specific message.
privacy_page.s7_p1: QryptNote is not intended for use by individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacy_page.s8_p1: If you believe QryptNote is being used to share illegal content, harass someone, or violate someone's rights, please contact us immediately at qryptnote.support@gmail.com. We will cooperate with law enforcement requests to the extent legally required and technically possible, noting that message content may no longer exist by the time a report is received due to the platform's self-destructing design.
privacy_page.s9_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify users of any material changes by updating the 'Last updated' date at the top of this page. Your continued use of the service after such modifications constitutes your acknowledgment of the modified policy.
privacy_page.s10_p1: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: qryptnote.support@gmail.com

terms_page.title: Terms of Service
terms_page.s1_p1: QryptNote provides a platform for users to create and share encrypted private messages via QR codes and unique short links. Messages will become permanently inaccessible if the recipient switches apps or tabs. Messages are encrypted using a key managed by QryptNote's infrastructure. In the event of key rotation, technical failure, or service discontinuation, previously created messages may become permanently unreadable. QryptNote is not liable for any loss of access to message content.
terms_page.s2_p1: By using QryptNote, you agree not to use the service to:
terms_page.s2_l1: Transmit any content that is illegal, threatening, defamatory, fraudulent, or abusive.
terms_page.s2_l3: Share content that violates others' privacy or intellectual property rights.
terms_page.s2_l4: Use the service to facilitate illegal transactions, harassment, or threats.
terms_page.s2_l5: Distribute malware, phishing links, spam, or any other harmful code.
terms_page.s2_l6: Attempt to bypass, disable, or interfere with our security features, rate limits, or payment systems.
terms_page.s2_p2: We reserve the right to remove any content or terminate access to users who violate these acceptable use policies, and such violations may result in cooperation with law enforcement.
terms_page.s3_p1: You must be at least 13 years old (or the applicable legal age of majority in your jurisdiction) to use QryptNote. By using the service, you represent that you meet this requirement.
terms_page.s4_title: 4. No Guarantee of Delivery or Availability
terms_page.s4_p1: QryptNote is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis. While we strive for high reliability, we make no guarantees regarding the continuous availability of the service. We are not liable for any messages that are lost, delayed, or become inaccessible due to server errors, maintenance, or natural expiration.
terms_page.s5_p1: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless QryptNote and its operators from any claims, damages, or liabilities arising from content you create, share, or distribute using this service.
terms_page.s6_p1: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, QryptNote shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of data, unauthorized access to your messages, service interruptions, or other intangible losses resulting from your use of or inability to use the service.
terms_page.s7_p1: You retain all ownership rights to the content you create and send using QryptNote. By using the service, you grant QryptNote a limited, non-exclusive license to temporarily store, encrypt, and transmit your messages strictly for the purpose of providing the service to you and your intended recipients.
terms_page.s8_p1: If you believe content shared via QryptNote infringes your copyright or violates the law, contact us at qryptnote.support@gmail.com with details. Due to the self-destructing and encrypted nature of the service, we may not be able to remove content already viewed or expired, but will act on valid reports where technically possible.
terms_page.s9_p1: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes arising out of these terms shall first be attempted to be resolved informally. If informal resolution fails, the dispute shall be resolved by binding arbitration or in the courts of India.
terms_page.s10_p1: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the service at any time, with or without cause or notice, including if we believe you have violated these Terms of Service.
terms_page.s11_p1: We may modify these Terms of Service at any time. Material changes will be communicated by updating the 'Last updated' date at the top of this page. Your continued use of the service after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms_page.s12_p1: If you have any questions or concerns regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us at: qryptnote.support@gmail.com
